title: ilex shweliensis
intro: Ilex shweliensis, also known as the Tibetan Holly, is a plant species that belongs to the holly family (Aquifoliaceae). The plant is traditionally used in Tibetan medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Ilex shweliensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Ilex shweliensis often include tea infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
